'''Durundo''' was an up-and-coming [[Pacithhip/Legends|Pacithhip]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]] who joined the professional circuit shortly after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].<ref name="CSWE" /> He competed in the final race of the [[Vinta Harvest Classic/Legends|Vinta Harvest Classic]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Durundo lost the race to the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]].
